problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: If Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
